stepsSummary: Log breakfast/lunch/dinner including a custom food and an edited portion.
expectedSummary: Per-meal and daily macros update correctly; portion edits are simple; no duplicate/ghost entries.
summary: BUG: UAT-006 First day of food tracking (Beginner) - Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
reproSteps: Open edit action on one existing row.
Change serving-size text and save update.
Verify edited value appears once and only once.
Validate recent list still has expected row count.
expected: Per-meal and daily macros update correctly; portion edits are simple; no duplicate/ghost entries.
recommendation: Fix the failing Nutrition flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-006 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: Edited row persists updated serving-size text.
Verify: No duplicate/ghost rows after edit-save cycle.
